creator: steffen@fritz.wtf
text:
Hi,

thanks for your comment.

It still fails, this time with the dependency error:

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/sbin/nginx is linked to /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1 from devel/pcre but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libpcre.so:devel/pcre
